notes: Privatised 1999 as AWB Ltd; ceased as statutory board.
Single-desk monopoly ended 2012; final privatization/sale activity concluded 2015.
Renamed Ghana Cocoa Board (COCOBOD) in 1979; originally Cocoa Marketing Board.
Merged into Fonterra in 2001; NZDB created 1923.
Statutory Milk Marketing Board created 1933; dissolved and assets privatised 1994.
